schema_note: Classified as pattern 'plan' rather than 'schedule' -- this sheet is a spatial equipment-location layout (each AC/fan/grille placed on the floor plan at its actual room position), not a tabular schedule of specs. Matches the pattern choice used for house #1's equivalent M-01 sheet (บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า37.json), which is the only other mechanical-discipline reference available.

warnings: GRID CONFIRMATION: the printed dimension chain on this page (3.20x3=9.60 horizontal; 4.00+2.00+3.60+1.80+3.15=14.55 vertical) matches the building grid master exactly, same as EE-03/EE-04.

This house has 3 bedrooms (vs house #1's 2), so this sheet has one more wall-type AC unit (3x 12,000 BTU here, vs house #1's 12,000+9,000 BTU pair) and one more 40 CFM ceiling fan/4x4 grille pair to serve the third bedroom.

This is the only mechanical sheet in the drawing set (M-01 of 1, per title block drawing no. 'M-58109'), covering recommended AC/ceiling-fan/exhaust-grille placement for the ground floor -- same scope as house #1's M-01.

Room-to-equipment pairing for the two 40 CFM units near the top of the plan is a best-effort reading based on physical proximity/leader-line position on the drawing, not an explicit per-room label on every unit -- flagged as moderate rather than full confidence.

No cost/BTU-sizing calculation basis (e.g. room area used to size the 12,000 BTU units) is shown on this sheet -- it only presents the recommended equipment and location, consistent with it being a mechanical layout plan rather than a load-calculation sheet.
This is the last page of the assigned range (44-48).
